title: Drippy Gems
description: 9 Gems that you can get through traiding.
body:
9 Gems that you can get trough traiding with a villager asigned to the Gem Table. | The 6 Gems are: Explosive Gem - Explodes the Area around you | Fire Gem - shoots an op fire Arrow | Gem of Dragon - Dragon Breath around you | Lightning gem - Casts 3 Lightnings at you | End Gem - Teleports you to the End when clicked in the air | Nether Gem - the same as the end one but for the nether (both of them are teleporting you back when clicked on a block) | Time and Weather Gem - Makes it rain/night when clicked in the air and when clicked on block back day/clear | Respawn Gem - sets your Respawn point to your location | In order to craft the new block you have to upgrade a smithing table with a Diamond Block and an Upgrade template in the smithing table | There are Pictures of them in the gallery. (Its recommended to use the End Gem with Elytra and Rockets for savety) 

Lost the Mod files unfortunatelly. So no Updates.
